parameters.perturbation_fraction: 5% per bin (50% sub-sample of each decile)

prediction_outcome: Scenario B confirmed (25% pre-registered) — accuracy still mostly saturated at 5% dose
key_finding: Llama K-routing extremely distributed: even 5% K-direction perturbation saturates accuracy at 0-2.6% for bins 0-6. Only bin 9 (15.8%) recovers. V-only immunity RESTORED at 5% dose (92.1% vs 71.1% at 10%). K > V gap increases to +76pp. Text gradient dose-independent (~9pp/bin). Exp 028 late=22% was inflated by coarse binning.
evidence_impact: Strengthens Llama K-routing fragility claim; restores V-immunity at 5%; increases K > V gap; partially resolves Open Questions #4 and #6
next_planned: 5% dose sweep on Qwen-Base for cross-model comparison OR 2-3% dose on Llama to reveal accuracy gradients

null_space_existence.status: CONFIRMED in K-space (p=0.013). Narrow but real. Qwen-specific.

spatial_structure.status: DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED for selectivity. Positional dissociation confirmed (text gradient only).

positional_dissociation.status: Dose-saturated: 5% dose STILL saturates Llama accuracy. Only bin 9 (15.8%) recovers. Text gradient dose-independent. Need <5% dose or Qwen comparison.

geometric_dissociation.status: K > V UNIVERSAL. +76pp at 5% dose (V recovers more → gap increases). 5/5 models confirmed.

natural_usage.status: H2O/TC protection via position. TC best protection metric.

cross_model_replication.status: COMPLETE: 4 families, 5 training variants, GQA + MHA, Base + Instruct. Positional sweep on 2 models at 2 doses.

encoding_strategy.status: COMPLETE TAXONOMY + encoding-independence at 10% dose + V-immunity dose-dependence confirmed.
